Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Reroute at Damen & Ainslie
ShortDescription: #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via  Damen, Lawrence, Ashland, over regular route due to street blockage near Damen/Ainslie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via  Damen, Lawrence, Ashland, over regular route due to street blockage near Damen/Ainslie.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #35 31st/35th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 31st/Kostner
ShortDescription: Eastbound #35 31st/35th buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Ogden, 26th, Kostner, 31st, and over normal route, due to street blockage near 31st/Kostner.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #35 31st/35th buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Ogden, 26th, Kostner, 31st, and over  normal route, due to street blockage near 31st/Kostner.

Westbound buses are not affected.
